content: Read the original reviews carousel styles from page-overview-multiquiz.css
Implement container changes: background color #fff, padding 4rem
Update section title styles: 58px STIX Two Text, 400 weight, line height 1, letter spacing -2%
Update section subtitle styles: 28px DM Sans, 400 weight, #605B52 at 80% opacity
Add spacing: 16px between title/subtitle, 32px between subtitle/carousel
Update card styles: remove borders, 15px border radius, #F1F0EF background, 12px image radius
Update typography: quote title 22px DM Sans 500, quote block 16px DM Sans 400, attribution styles
Set card spacing: 16px 16px 24px 16px padding, 24px between image/title, 16px between title/quote
Add card drop shadow and pagination updates (arrows, dot styles)
